testcase.name: test_news_crud_full_lifecycle

failure.message:
AssertionError: {"ok":false,"error":"
Invalid `prisma.newsArticle.create()` invocation:

{
  data: {
    slug: "test-news-1782301411",
    titleFr: "TEST News FR",
    titleEn: "TEST News EN",
    bodyFr: "## FR body",
    bodyEn: "## EN body",
    coverImage: "https://example.com/cov.jpg",
    ~~~~~~~~~~
    published: true,
?   id?: String,
?   image?: String,
?   createdAt?: DateTime,
?   updatedAt?: DateTime
  }
}

Unknown argument `coverImage`. Available options are marked with ?."}
assert 400 in (200, 201)
 +  where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.failure:
backend/tests/test_admin_cms_security.py:152: in test_news_crud_full_lifecycle assert r.status_code in (200, 201), r.text E AssertionError: {"ok":false,"error":"
Invalid `prisma.newsArticle.create()` invocation:

{
 data: {
 slug: "test-news-1782301411",
 titleFr: "TEST News FR",
 titleEn: "TEST News EN",
 bodyFr: "## FR body",
 bodyEn: "## EN body",
 coverImage: "https://example.com/cov.jpg",
 ~~~~~~~~~~
 published: true,
? id?: String,
? image?: String,
? createdAt?: DateTime,
? updatedAt?: DateTime
 }
}

Unknown argument `coverImage`. Available options are marked with ?."} E assert 400 in (200, 201) E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code
